subject: Re: GIV s/n 1108
body:
ours plus 10 million ,, thats it 


----- Original Message ----
From: "LVJET@aol.com" <LVJET@aol.com>
To: JEEPROJECT@YAHOO.COM
Sent: Tuesday, March 25, 2008 6:42:09 PM
Subject: GIV s/n 1108


Jeffrey,
I received a phone call from Charlie who is handling the sale of this Gulfstream 4.
He said some one spoke to you on this aircraft, here are the specs.
1989 
total time 5700 with only 3200 landings,,,the major 72 month was completed last year...the maintenance numbers and interior floor plan look interesting.
Ask is 19M  but he said there is a lot of room and would take much lower.
lv






Create a Home Theater Like the Pros. Watch the video on AOL Home.


-----Inline Message Follows-----


Dear Larry,
 
At Charlie Tolbert's request, attached are specs, photos & CMP on this Gulfstream IV.
 
Charlie would appreciate receiving same on your GIIB s/n 151.  Thanks.  You can just email back to me.
 
Regards,
Dottie Lindsay
